title: Ep 1: Doug Henderson's War on Joy
summary: This week in town, a new highway sign goes up and somehow becomes the most important thing that’s happened all year. Old grudges resurface, neighbours get creative, the fine Canadian tradition of pettiness escalates into art. Welcome to the tiny Vancouver Island town of Mirror Falls. Take your time. ❤️ ✨ Did you enjoy this episode?
